subject: Fwd: epstein
body: So he didn't read the affidavit?

subject: Fwd: epstein
body:
He verified the affidavit- like a notary- verifying/swearing to only the fact that the officer who filled it out and signed it was who he purports to be. When an officer does that for the officer drafting the document that is all he is doing- he is not swearing to the contents of the document or their veracity- just like any other notary. Make sense?

Tonja Haddad Coleman, Esq.  
Tonja Haddad, P.A.  
Advocate Building  
315 SE 7th Street  
Fort Lauderdale, FL 33301
